commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: His disciples say, &c. The disciples say this, because they feared the Jews on account of Christ, and still more for themselves.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: They therefore had feared for Him also, but for the more part rather for themselves; for they were not yet perfect. So Thomas, shaking with fear, said, Let us go, that we also may die with Him John 11:16, because Thomas was weaker and more unbelieving than the rest. But see how Jesus encourages them by what He says.
